item.title: Bases Loaded-based hololive baseball game holoBase announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Build a team with hololive talents, fans, and mascots.

Publisher holo Indie and developer Clover Lab have announced holoBase, a pixel art baseball game based on the classic Jaleco title Bases Loaded. It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

The classic full-scale baseball game Bases Loaded returns on holo Indie!!

A baseball game where you build a team with hololive talents, fans, and mascots, inspired by holoBase and compete in exciting matches.

Three game modes:

  • hololive League
  • Versus Mode
  • Online Mode

hololive League

Create your very own team, battle your way through the leagues, and develop your team along the way.

Advance through three different leagues and aim for the league championship.

Choose Your Manager Type

Your manager type determines your team’s growth direction.

Develop the stats that best match your playstyle and strengthen your team your way.

Versus Mode

Customize the rules and enjoy local matches in both player-versus-environment and player-versus-player.

You can also battle using the team you trained in hololive League.

Online Mode

Compete online against players from across the country.

You can also use the team you trained in hololive League for online matches.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer
